subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! This is a Tablet wherein mention is made of thee from the presence of the Wronged One, and whereby the Concourse on High make mention of thee throughout the duration of God's Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح سین هذا لوح یذکرک من لدی المظلوم و یذکرک به الملا الاعلی بدوام کتاب الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for praise and gratitude, @the concourse on high
